strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_CLAYUNLOCKABLE_ACHIE: Ut Paladin, adipiscere quamdam urnam parasiticam.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_CRUELSUNUNLOCKABLE_A: Ut Paladin, sustine totum ictum Solis et supersto.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_HEALUNLOCKABLE_ACHIE: Ut Paladin, sana socium cum Gnarled Woodsprite. <color=#c11>Solum hospes</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_LIGHTNINGSPEARUNLOCK: Ut Paladin, percutite hostem cum Royal Capacitor. <color=#c11>Solum hospes</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_LUNARSHARDUNLOCKABLE: Ut Paladin, tene 8 res Lunares simul.
Paladin: Herald of the Lost King
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_AC: Ut Paladin, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_POISONUNLOCKABLE_ACH: Ut Paladin, ine pactum cum dea corruptionis.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_TORPORUNLOCKABLE_ACH: Ut Paladin, accumula 4 debuffs in uno hoste.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_TYPHOONUNLOCKABLE_AC: Ut Paladin, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon aut Eclipse.\n<color=#8888>(Quisque difficultas Typhoon aut superior computatur)</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_PALADIN_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVEME: Utere Beads of Fealty et fias integer iterum.
strings.KEYWORD_SWORDBEAM: <style=cKeywordName>Sword Beam</style><style=cSub>Radius lucis penetrans, brevis distantiae qui infligit <style=cIsDamage>300% vulneris</style>.
strings.KEYWORD_TORPOR: <style=cKeywordName>Torpor</style><style=cSub>Applicat <style=cIsHealth>60%</style> impugnationis et motus <style=cIsDamage>tarditatem</style>. <style=cIsHealth>Trahit hostes ad terram.</style>
strings.PALADIN_DESCRIPTION:
Paladin est versatilis gladius magus qui potest eligere magicam alterutram aut vastissimam gladiatoriam artem ad socios iuvandos et hostes delendos.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Tua passiva bonam partem vulneris tui constituit, conare eam tenere quam maxime.

< ! > Spinning Slash potest servire aut ut potens instrumentum multitudinis regendae aut ut forma limitatae mobilitatis.

< ! > Frigus Quickstep minuitur quoque ictu, te compensans quia in crassitudine eius manes.

< ! > Vow of Silence est magna via tractandi volantes hostes, quia omnes affectos ad terram trahit.
strings.PALADIN_LORE:
"Ibis ad Petrichor V.  Haec planeta electa est pro peregrinatione tua, poena pro peccatis in populum tuum commissis<s>, K        </s>."

Aspexi ante, spoliatus loricâ meâ et gladio meo.  Corona mea, fracta.  Carapax mea obsidiana, laesa et scissa.  Gemma parva, stellata, infixa in palma dextera mea, reliquiae praeteriti mei ut rex.  Tenent me ligatum et pellunt me ad navem, finem lineae, sacrificium meum pro bono fratrum et sororum mearum.

Feci hoc ad salvandum populum meum, etiamsi nolunt accipere talia beneficia.  Non caderem in eorum consuetudines bellis et doloribus numquam finientibus.  Conatus sum eos mutare ad meliorationem suam, sed difficili via didici traditionalismum esse quod unus solus mutare non potest.

Sit ita.  Fortasse nuntius meus vivet in mentibus eorum qui me defendere conati sunt.  Fortasse actiones meae aliquid significant, fortasse in nihilum resultabunt.  De fato meo non curam, tantum spero populum meum de praeteritis suis discere et se meliorare.

Pro causa populi mei, pro causa historiae nostrae, pro causa longaevitatis...

Ad stellas eo... ad hanc planetam rumorum silentium.
strings.PALADIN_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, fides in doctrina sua quassata.
strings.PALADIN_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Dum supra <style=cIsHealth>90% valetudine</style> aut dum habet activum <style=cIsHealth>barrier</style>, Paladin est <style=cIsHealing>benedictus</style>, roborans omnes gladii peritias et <style=cIsHealing>benedicens quoque omnes proximossocios</style>.
strings.PALADIN_PRIMARY_CURSESLASH_DESCRIPTION: Seca pro <style=cIsDamage>380% vulneris</style>. Pugnat <style=cIsUtility>radium lucis</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>300% vulneris</style> si Paladin est <style=cIsHealing>benedictus</style>.
strings.PALADIN_PRIMARY_SLASH_DESCRIPTION: Seca pro <style=cIsDamage>300% vulneris</style>. Pugnat <style=cIsUtility>radium lucis</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>300% vulneris</style> si Paladin est <style=cIsHealing>benedictus</style>.
strings.PALADIN_SECONDARY_LIGHTNING_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Expavescens.</style> <style=cIsUtility>Agilis.</style> Onerare et iactare <style=cIsUtility>fulmen</style>, infligens usque ad <style=cIsDamage>700% vulneris</style>. Iacta ad pedes tuos ad tegendum tuam laminae per <style=cIsUtility>fulmen</style> pro <style=cIsUtility>4 secundis</style>.
strings.PALADIN_SECONDARY_LUNARSHARD_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis.</style> Puga salven <style=cIsUtility>fragmentorum lunarium</style>, infligens <style=cIsDamage>75% vulneris</style> quodque. Tene usque ad <style=cIsDamage>12</style> fragmenta.
strings.PALADIN_SECONDARY_SPINSLASH_DESCRIPTION: Perfice <style=cIsUtility>latum ictum stupefacentem</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>750% vulneris</style>, acquirens latitudinem si <style=cIsHealing>benedictus</style>. Dum in aere, potius fac saltus ictus, pugnando <style=cIsUtility>undam impulsus</style> si <style=cIsHealing>benedictus</style>.
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_BERSERK_DESCRIPTION: Dum infra <style=cIsHealth>25% valetudine</style>, genera <style=cIsDamage>Iram</style>. Cum maxima <style=cIsDamage>Ira</style>, utere ad inirendum <color=#dc0000>Berserker Mode</color>, acquirens <style=cIsHealing>magnum buff</style> et <style=cIsUtility>novum peritiarum set</style>.
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_HEALZONE_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>1.5</style> secundis, tunc dimitte ad <style=cIsUtility>Benedicendum</style> aream pro <style=cIsDamage>12 secundis</style>, gradatim <style=cIsHealing>restaurans valetudinem</style> et praebens <style=cIsHealing>barrier</style> omnibus sociis intus.
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_SCEPSUN_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealth>Overheat</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>2</style> secundis ad creandam <style=cIsUtility>stellam miniaturam</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>12.5</style> secundis quae overheats <style=cDeath>OMNIA</style> circum eam. Ad <style=cIsHealth>2</style> stackos aut plus, cusi ardent pro <style=cIsDamage>160% vulneris</style>.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Iacta iterum et tene ad intendendum, tunc dimitte ad iactandam stellam, explodens pro <style=cIsDamage>4000% vulneris</style> ad <style=cDeath>OMNIA</style> circum eam.</color>
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_SCEPSUN_LEGACY_DESCRIPTI: <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>5</style> secundis, tunc dimitte ad creandam <style=cIsUtility>stellam miniaturam</style> quae <style=cIsDamage>drains valetudinem</style> ab <style=cIsHealth>OMNIBUS</style> entitatibus circum eam.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Explodit pro magno crepitu 9001% vulneris.</color>
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_SCEPTERHEALZONE_DESCRIPT: <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>1.5</style> secundis, tunc dimitte ad <style=cIsUtility>Benedicendum</style> aream pro <style=cIsDamage>12 secundis</style>, gradatim <style=cIsHealing>restaurans valetudinem</style> et praebens <style=cIsHealing>barrier</style> omnibus sociis intus.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Duplex sanatio. Duplex barrier. Purgat debuffs.</color>
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_SCEPTERTORPOR_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>2</style> secundis, tunc dimitte ad <style=cIsUtility>Silentiendum</style> aream pro <style=cIsDamage>10 secundis</style>, inferens <style=cIsHealth>torpor</style> omnibus hostibus in vicinitate.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Fortior debuff. Maius radius. Destruit projecta.</color>
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_SCEPTERWARCRY_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>2</style> secundis, tunc dimitte ad <style=cIsUtility>Empower</style> aream pro <style=cIsDamage>8 secundis</style>, augens <style=cIsDamage>vulnus</style> et <style=cIsDamage>celeritatem impugnationis</style> omnibus sociis intus.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Velocior celeritas iaciendi. Duplex vulnus. Duplex celeritas impugnationis.</color>
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_SUN_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealth>Overheat</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>2</style> secundis ad creandam <style=cIsUtility>stellam miniaturam</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>12.5</style> secundis quae overheats <style=cDeath>OMNIA</style> circum eam. Ad <style=cIsHealth>2</style> stackos aut plus, cusi ardent pro <style=cIsDamage>160% vulneris</style>.
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_SUN_LEGACY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>5</style> secundis, tunc dimitte ad creandam <style=cIsUtility>stellam miniaturam</style> quae <style=cIsDamage>drains valetudinem</style> ab <style=cIsHealth>OMNIBUS</style> entitatibus circum eam.
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_TORPOR_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>2</style> secundis, tunc dimitte ad <style=cIsUtility>Silentiendum</style> aream pro <style=cIsDamage>10 secundis</style>, inferens <style=cIsHealth>torpor</style> omnibus hostibus in vicinitate.
strings.PALADIN_SPECIAL_WARCRY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Canal</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>2</style> secundis, tunc dimitte ad <style=cIsUtility>Empower</style> aream pro <style=cIsDamage>8 secundis</style>, augens <style=cIsDamage>vulnus</style> et <style=cIsDamage>celeritatem impugnationis</style> omnibus sociis intus.
strings.PALADIN_UTILITY_DASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Cursor</style> brevem distantiam et acquire <style=cIsHealing>15% barrier</style>. Felices ictus ab <style=cIsDamage>Divine Blade</style> <style=cIsUtility>minuunt frigus</style> per <style=cIsDamage>1 secundam</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Condite usque ad 2 cursorum.<style=cIsHealing>
strings.PALADIN_UTILITY_HEAL_DESCRIPTION: Restaura <style=cIsHealing>15% maximam valetudinem</style> et praebet <style=cIsHealing>15% barrier</style> omnibus sociis in area.
